arts.ttl: Chelsea forward Nicolas Jackson demands more criticism from supporters, media
arts.sum: Chelsea forward Nicolas Jackson insists that he has thrived on the frequent criticism that he has received since his arrival at Stamford Bridge.

arts.ttl: Man United, Chelsea 'battling for £21m wonderkid' amid Tottenham, Aston Villa interest
arts.sum: Manchester United and Chelsea are reportedly in a race against Tottenham Hotspur and Newcastle United for Southampton youngster Tyler Dibling.

arts.ttl: Chelsea ‘plan to go all out’ to sign player – Blues need to be convincing and offer €45m
arts.sum: Chelsea are among the clubs following River Plate’s Franco Mastantuono. The 17-year-old has impressed for the Argentine club since making his way into their first team earlier this year. He managed three goals and three assists from 40 games so far. arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Enzo Maresca delivers important Josh Acheampong contract update
